examples: Kyoto used to be the capital of Japan.
Kyoto people say that the women in their city have such beautiful skin because they eat plenty of eel.
Everything I know about the elegance of imperfection, I learned from the white porcelain plate I bought in Kyoto.
Kodaji was one of the first sites in Kyoto to light up during momiji-gari and hanami.
At its peak, Japan had more than 600 such cafes, mostly in Tokyo and Kyoto.
